sys_cb_design_topic.design_definition: {"type":"FlowTopic","triggers":[{"type":"Trigger","name":"b47f2802aa6c4c6fbd292f8724cfa050","triggerType":"request","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"id":"b47f2802aa6c4c6fbd292f8724cfa050"}],"goals":[{"name":"primary","trigger_id":"b47f2802aa6c4c6fbd292f8724cfa050","nodes":[{"type":"StartGoal","goal_id":"primary","greeting_msg":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"va:topic:7a97e2768708fed002fdeac73cbb35f6:node:4e2a7127b02242278ee77b406d45c656:field:GreetingMsg\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"id":"4e2a7127b02242278ee77b406d45c656","name":"Start","expert_mode":false},{"type":"TerminateGoal","goal_id":"primary","confirmation_msg":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"id":"537035c1b0af4218948531910b8e162e","name":"End","expert_mode":false},{"type":"InputPrompt","variable_id":"87ec94ff32a6400980f124897e60977d","message":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Please enter the customer ID\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"nlu_entity_binding":{"type":"NLUEntityBinding","allow_text_input":false,"use_confirmation_prompt":true},"request_feedback":true,"skippable":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"skipreprompt":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"id":"ae3de7b246e24429ba7edd5884f6985c","name":"Customer Number","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"formatType":"Text","validationScript":"","description":""},{"type":"ChoiceInputPrompt","expression_mode":"simple","metadataScript":"","cardName":"Small image with text","cardFields":[{"name":"title","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Select an Option to Continue\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"required":true},{"name":"description","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"required":false},{"name":"image","value":{"type":"String","mode":"script","value":"(function execute() { var url = gs.getProperty(\"glide.servlet.uri\"); return url + \"OIP (1)_1758479068139.jpg\";})()"},"required":true},{"name":"imageAlt","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"required":false}],"id":"86f1afcc0d52401588f20d962145d3d3","name":"Customer Choice","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"variable_id":"7c971c38a672431486e56e69bb272363","message":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"What would you like to do next?\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"request_feedback":false,"skippable":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"skipreprompt":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"nlu_entity_binding":{"type":"NLUEntityBinding","allow_text_input":false,"use_confirmation_prompt":true},"description":""},{"type":"TextOutputPrompt","value":[{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Here are the details for {0}:\", vaContext.getRequesterLang(), [vaInputs.customer_number])"}],"request_feedback":true,"id":"c705a2f175734795b15013b32366a398","name":"Bot Response 1","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"secure":false},{"type":"Decision","name":"Decision","branches":[{"type":"Branch","label":"Check Notification","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":"customer_choice=Check Notfictation"},"id":"0f2356407a2d45c4934b20092214e54c","name":"Check Notification","expert_mode":false},{"type":"Branch","label":"Check Profile Details","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":"customer_choice=Check Profile Details"},"id":"fe57cc287bc4448d8476c8753bcaa05b","name":"Check Profile Details","expert_mode":false},{"type":"Branch","label":"Always","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":""},"id":"30b4a9f2f6cf4a74854fb17e2f967706","name":"Always","expert_mode":false}],"id":"165485e34f2f4b738beea378329ed729","goal_id":"primary","expert_mode":false},{"type":"RecordOutputPrompt","mode":"query","table":"x_cpszo_spoke_customer_profile","fields":["name","email","mobile_number","last_payment_date","risk_score","risk_band","days_since_last_payment","credit_behaviour"],"request_feedback":true,"id":"f0cb0f77f3cf49a9aa93ded5907e21b8","name":"Customer Profile Details","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"reference_qualifier_condition":"name={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}","condition":{"type":"Condition","mode":"glide_query","value":"name={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}"}},{"type":"TextOutputPrompt","value":[{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"va:topic:7a97e2768708fed002fdeac73cbb35f6:node:7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb:field:0\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"}],"request_feedback":true,"id":"7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb","name":"Gretting","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"secure":false},{"type":"TableOutput","mode":"glide_record","conditionType":"simple","query":"NQnumber={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}","sortBy":"^ORDERBYsys_created_on","table":"x_cpszo_spoke_reminder_log","title":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"columns":[{"name":"last_contact_date","label":"Last Contact Date"},{"name":"reminder_schedule","label":"Reminder Schedule"},{"name":"reminder_message","label":"Reminder Message"},{"name":"reminder_type","label":"Reminder Type"}],"showColumnHeaders":true,"noResultsMessage":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"There are currently no reminders associated with this customer."},"id":"5b0b7f9916bf4866890ab057acf4f688","name":"Customer Reminder","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false},{"type":"RecordOutputPrompt","mode":"query","table":"x_cpszo_spoke_offer_tracker","fields":["number","offer_type","delinquency_status","installment_amount"],"request_feedback":true,"id":"4e08341d36764bfd9dffa05736bf6189","name":"Suggest Amount"}],"showColumnHeaders":true,"noResultsMessage":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"There are currently no reminders associated with this
